name: Webview theme tokens
description: Shared design-token layer for all extension webviews. webviewTheme.ts exports themeTokenDecls(surface: 'sidebar' | 'editor') which emits the CSS custom-property block (--bg-*, --fg-*, --clay*, --border*, --ok/--warn/--danger, fonts, radii) derived from the active VS Code theme's --vscode-* variables via color-mix(), with the former Paper & Clay palette values as fallbacks. Consumed by reactWebview.ts (React sidebar views + editor pages, surface param), panelTheme.ts (string-built sidebar panels), prefsPanelHtml.ts, globalPrefsPanelHtml.ts, and brandView.ts. A contract test (packages/extension/test/webviewTheme.test.ts) asserts every non---vscode-* token consumed by ui/styles.css is declared. The Paper & Clay theme itself was extracted to github.com/tesenwein/paper-and-clay-theme.
guidelines: Never hardcode palette hex/rgba values in webview CSS — reference the tokens, or derive tints with color-mix(in srgb, var(--token) N%, transparent).

Accent (--clay) maps to var(--vscode-button-background, var(--vscode-focusBorder, …)) — button-background first because many themes ship a near-invisible focusBorder; --fg-2 prefers --vscode-descriptionForeground; --warn prefers --vscode-editorWarning-foreground; --border falls back widget-border → panel-border → mix.
Font tokens follow user settings: --font-ui = var(--vscode-font-family, …), --font-mono = var(--vscode-editor-font-family, …) — the legacy families are only fallbacks, no @font-face is bundled.
Sidebar webviews use surface 'sidebar' (sideBar-background base); editor-tab pages use 'editor' (editor-background base).
Elevation steps (--bg-1..3) and fg fades (--fg-1..4) are color-mix ratios of --fg-0 into --bg-0 — they work in both light and dark themes; keep color-scheme: light dark.
When adding a token that ui/styles.css consumes, the contract test in packages/extension/test/webviewTheme.test.ts must keep passing — it greps styles.css for var(--…) usages.
anti_patterns: Adding a new webview host with its own hardcoded :root palette instead of importing themeTokenDecls.
Using rgba(217,119,87, …) or other Paper & Clay literals in panel CSS.
Sourcing the accent from --vscode-focusBorder alone — prefer button-background first.
